_comment: Mortal Dust Frontier Outpost (凡尘域前哨) — a humble waystation at the edge of the Mortal Dust Region where newly-ascended cultivators from the Cave World first arrive. Canon: the Mortal Dust Region is the frontier of the IAC — dusty, sparse, where lower-tier immortals scrape by. These outposts offer basic supplies and information. Biome: mortal_dust_region. Stand-in: village town center.
